headline: PNC Surpasses Community Benefits Plan Commitment With $119 Billion in Community Investments
summary: NORTHAMPTON, MA / ACCESS Newswire / April 8, 2026 / Highlights Together, we exceeded the $88B CBP Pledge to uplift low- and moderate-income (LMI) communities. Over four years, PNC delivered $119.3 billion in capital, loans, and philanthropic giving ...
